data.name: Loving Touch
data.detailed_description:
Loving Touch is a erotic massage simulation/visual novel game. Play as the owner of a massage parlor and help reinvigorate tired women! Talk to special clients outside of the workplace to advance your relationship with them. Who knows? They might grow into something special! Use your loving touch and spread relaxation!

FEATURES

  • Grow your relationship with special clients!

  • A story about what it means to relax

  • Many hand-drawn massage animations and sex scenes to see!

GAMEPLAY

  • Simple, relaxing gameplay loop

  • Massage clients to upgrade your skills

  • Random generation system for clients for more replay value

data.short_description: Loving Touch is a erotic massage simulation/visual novel game. Play as the owner of a massage parlor and help reinvigorate tired women! Talk to special clients outside of the workplace to advance your relationship with them. Use your loving touch and spread relaxation!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible or M1+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+ or similar (x86_64 or ARM)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
